title: nixos_hosts
description: Authoritative contract for downstream NixOS host facts produced by terraform/ and consumed by nixos/ inside this monorepo.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this contract. Consumers must pin or range-match on this value.

hosts.description: Map of Terraform container name to its NixOS-facing host facts.

vmid.description: Proxmox VMID for the LXC container.

hostname.description: DNS-style hostname applied inside the container.

node.description: Proxmox cluster node hosting the container.

ipv4.description: Primary IPv4 address in CIDR form, e.g. 10.0.0.10/24.

mac_address.description: Stable MAC address for the primary interface.

bridge.description: Proxmox bridge the primary interface attaches to.

template_file_id.description: Proxmox storage file id of the NixOS LXC template used to build the container.

ssh_user.description: Bootstrap SSH user the NixOS repo uses for initial configuration.

tags.description: Proxmox tags applied to the container for grouping and filtering.

nixos_role.description: Logical role name the NixOS repo maps to a flake/module configuration.
